answer: In Austin, 94.2% of service requests are marked as "Closed," with 2,301,033 requests in this category, while 3.6% are "Duplicate (closed)" and 1.4% are "Resolved." In Dallas, the data for service request statuses is not provided here, so a direct comparison cannot be made.
